title: Peggelar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Peggelars''' were [[Insect/Legends|insects]] that would pupate in winter, to emerge in spring as [[rosewing]]s. [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] collected the discarded pupae as a child on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{Mo}}
